_comment: Lenovo IdeaPad/Yoga BIOS profile. WMI availability NOT confirmed on 82YN Yoga 7 — falls back to generic UEFI variable manipulation. Update this file once WMI is probed on DESKTOP-2HHV897 (192.168.1.8).
notes: IdeaPad/Yoga line does NOT always expose root\WMI Lenovo BIOS classes — this is primarily a ThinkPad feature.
If WMI probe fails (Lenovo_BIOSSetting not found), fall through to generic-uefi profile.
